title: Completed 26 pairwise regression tests for the Employee absence creation flow, logged in to the teacher account (username staffuser210@mailinator.com, password [redacted]). All 26 tests passe
description:
h1. Completed 26 pairwise regression tests for the Employee absence creation flow using the teacher account
h2. Description
Pairwise regression coverage for the Employee absence creation flow. The test signs in to the teacher account and creates absences for that same account across every reason, duration type, and substitute preference. The run confirms the form, leave balance deductions, and sub picker all behave correctly in Employee mode.
h2. Test Scope
Environment: InstaSub Staging — InstaSub
Login: teacher account — username
staffuser210@mailinator.com
, password [redacted]
Flow: Employee absence creation (/absence/createAbsence), target employee
staffuser210@mailinator.com
 (same as login)
Sub selected (Notify 1 Sub / Assign a specific sub): Sub 2
h2. Pairwise Matrix
Coverage dimensions
6 reasons: Sick, Personal, Vacation, Illness-Family Member, Educational Leave, Professional Development
5 duration types: Full Day, Half Day AM, Half Day PM, Enter Time Manually (10:00–15:00), Add Class
5 sub preferences: Notify all subs, Notify 1 Sub, Notify my favorites, Assign a specific sub, No sub required
h3. Part A — Duration Tests (T1–T20)
||#||Date||Reason||Duration||Sub Preference||Sub Selected||Result||

|T1|Jan 1, 2027|Sick|Full Day|Notify all subs|—|(/) PASS|

|T2|Jan 2, 2027|Personal|Full Day|Notify 1 Sub|Sub 2|(/) PASS|

|T3|Jan 3, 2027|Vacation|Full Day|Notify my favorites|—|(/) PASS|

|T4|Jan 4, 2027|Illness-Family Member|Full Day|Assign a specific sub|Sub 2|(/) PASS|

|T5|Jan 5, 2027|Educational Leave|Full Day|No sub required|—|(/) PASS|

|T6|Jan 6, 2027|Professional Development|Half Day AM|Notify all subs|—|(/) PASS|

|T7|Jan 7, 2027|Sick|Half Day AM|Notify 1 Sub|Sub 2|(/) PASS|

|T8|Jan 8, 2027|Personal|Half Day AM|Notify my favorites|—|(/) PASS|

|T9|Jan 9, 2027|Vacation|Half Day AM|Assign a specific sub|Sub 2|(/) PASS|

|T10|Jan 10, 2027|Illness-Family Member|Half Day AM|No sub required|—|(/) PASS|

|T11|Jan 11, 2027|Educational Leave|Half Day PM|Notify all subs|—|(/) PASS|

|T12|Jan 12, 2027|Professional Development|Half Day PM|Notify 1 Sub|Sub 2|(/) PASS|

|T13|Jan 13, 2027|Sick|Half Day PM|Notify my favorites|—|(/) PASS|

|T14|Jan 14, 2027|Personal|Half Day PM|Assign a specific sub|Sub 2|(/) PASS|

|T15|Jan 15, 2027|Vacation|Half Day PM|No sub required|—|(/) PASS|

|T16|Jan 18, 2027|Illness-Family Member|Enter Time Manually (10:00–15:00)|Notify all subs|—|(/) PASS|

|T17|Jan 19, 2027|Educational Leave|Enter Time Manually (10:00–15:00)|Notify 1 Sub|Sub 2|(/) PASS|

|T18|Jan 20, 2027|Professional Development|Enter Time Manually (10:00–15:00)|Notify my favorites|—|(/) PASS|

|T19|Jan 21, 2027|Sick|Enter Time Manually (10:00–15:00)|Assign a specific sub|Sub 2|(/) PASS|

|T20|Jan 22, 2027|Personal|Enter Time Manually (10:00–15:00)|No sub required|—|(/) PASS|
h3. Part B — Add Class Tests (T21–T26)
Add Class replaces the Duration dropdown. The class time inputs define the absence window.
||#||Date||Reason||Class Time||Sub Preference||Sub Selected||Result||

|T21|Jan 25, 2027|Vacation|08:00–12:00|Notify all subs|—|(/) PASS|

|T22|Jan 26, 2027|Illness-Family Member|10:00–14:00|Notify 1 Sub|Sub 2|(/) PASS|

|T23|Jan 27, 2027|Educational Leave|09:00–11:00|Notify my favorites|—|(/) PASS|

|T24|Feb 8, 2027|Professional Development|12:00–16:00|Assign a specific sub|Sub 2|(/) PASS|

|T25|Feb 9, 2027|Sick|08:00–10:00|No sub required|—|(/) PASS|

|T26|Feb 10, 2027|Personal|13:00–17:00|Notify all subs|—|(/) PASS|
h2. Result
26/26 tests passed. All 6 reasons, all 5 duration types (including Add Class), and all 5 sub preferences exercised. Sub 2 was successfully selected for all Notify 1 Sub and Assign a specific sub cases.
h2. Notes and Observations
Employee search requires character-by-character typing:
 Angular's autocomplete does not trigger on programmatic fill(). The search field requires real keyboard input (keyboard.type() with per-character delay) to fire change detection and populate the dropdown.
Sub 1 unverified:
 Sub 1 appeared in the picker but cannot be selected — attempting to do so returns "Unable to assign. This substitute has not been verified." Sub 2 was used as the verified alternative for all applicable tests. See BUG-02 in the full QA report.
Employee radio settle time:
 The Employee mat-radio-button requires a native mouse click after a waitForSelector plus 800 ms settle delay. Clicking too early after page load silently fails (no search input appears). See BUG-09 in the full QA report.
h2. Acceptance Criteria
Login succeeds with the teacher account (
staffuser210@mailinator.com
)
All 6 absence reasons selectable via the Employee flow
All 4 standard duration types (Full Day, Half Day AM, Half Day PM, Enter Time Manually) work in Employee mode
Add Class flow works for all 6 reasons in Employee mode
All 5 sub preference options available and functional in Employee mode
Sub 2 selectable via Notify 1 Sub and Assign a specific sub
Leave balance deducted correctly after each absence creation
An absence is successfully created in each test case
No blocking errors or UI failures across the 26-test run

detailedContent.plainText:
h1. Completed 26 pairwise regression tests for the Employee absence creation flow using the teacher account
h2. Description
Pairwise regression coverage for the Employee absence creation flow. The test signs in to the teacher account and creates absences for that same account across every reason, duration type, and substitute preference. The run confirms the form, leave balance deductions, and sub picker all behave correctly in Employee mode.
h2. Test Scope
Environment: InstaSub Staging — InstaSub
Login: teacher account — username
staffuser210@mailinator.com
, password [redacted]
Flow: Employee absence creation (/absence/createAbsence), target employee
staffuser210@mailinator.com
 (same as login)
Sub selected (Notify 1 Sub / Assign a specific sub): Sub 2
h2. Pairwise Matrix
Coverage dimensions
6 reasons: Sick, Personal, Vacation, Illness-Family Member, Educational Leave, Professional Development
5 duration types: Full Day, Half Day AM, Half Day PM, Enter Time Manually (10:00–15:00), Add Class
5 sub preferences: Notify all subs, Notify 1 Sub, Notify my favorites, Assign a specific sub, No sub required
h3. Part A — Duration Tests (T1–T20)
||#||Date||Reason||Duration||Sub Preference||Sub Selected||Result||

|T1|Jan 1, 2027|Sick|Full Day|Notify all subs|—|(/) PASS|

|T2|Jan 2, 2027|Personal|Full Day|Notify 1 Sub|Sub 2|(/) PASS|

|T10|Jan 10, 2027|Illness-Family Member|Half Day AM|No sub required|—|(/) PASS|

|T11|Jan 11, 2027|Educational Leave|Half Day PM|Notify all subs|—|(/) PASS|

|T12|Jan 12, 2027|Professional Development|Half Day PM|Notify 1 Sub|Sub 2|(/) PASS|

|T13|Jan 13, 2027|Sick|Half Day PM|Notify my favorites|—|(/) PASS|

|T14|Jan 14, 2027|Personal|Half Day PM|Assign a specific sub|Sub 2|(/) PASS|

|T15|Jan 15, 2027|Vacation|Half Day PM|No sub required|—|(/) PASS|

|T16|Jan 18, 2027|Illness-Family Member|Enter Time Manually (10:00–15:00)|Notify all subs|—|(/) PASS|

|T17|Jan 19, 2027|Educational Leave|Enter Time Manually (10:00–15:00)|Notify 1 Sub|Sub 2|(/) PASS|

|T18|Jan 20, 2027|Professional Development|Enter Time Manually (10:00–15:00)|Notify my favorites|—|(/) PASS|

|T19|Jan 21, 2027|Sick|Enter Time Manually (10:00–15:00)|Assign a specific sub|Sub 2|(/) PASS|

|T20|Jan 22, 2027|Personal|Enter Time Manually (10:00–15:00)|No sub required|—|(/) PASS|
h3. Part B — Add Class Tests (T21–T26)
Add Class replaces the Duration dropdown. The class time inputs define the absence window.
||#||Date||Reason||Class Time||Sub Preference||Sub Selected||Result||

|T21|Jan 25, 2027|Vacation|08:00–12:00|Notify all subs|—|(/) PASS|

|T22|Jan 26, 2027|Illness-Family Member|10:00–14:00|Notify 1 Sub|Sub 2|(/) PASS|

|T23|Jan 27, 2027|Educational Leave|09:00–11:00|Notify my favorites|—|(/) PASS|

|T24|Feb 8, 2027|Professional Development|12:00–16:00|Assign a specific sub|Sub 2|(/) PASS|

|T25|Feb 9, 2027|Sick|08:00–10:00|No sub required|—|(/) PASS|

|T26|Feb 10, 2027|Personal|13:00–17:00|Notify all subs|—|(/) PASS|
h2. Result
26/26 tests passed. All 6 reasons, all 5 duration types (including Add Class), and all 5 sub preferences exercised. Sub 2 was successfully selected for all Notify 1 Sub and Assign a specific sub cases.
h2. Notes and Observations
Employee search requires character-by-character typing:
 Angular's autocomplete does not trigger on programmatic fill(). The search field requires real keyboard input (keyboard.type() with per-character delay) to fire change detection and populate the dropdown.
Sub 1 unverified:
 Sub 1 appeared in the picker but cannot be selected — attempting to do so returns "Unable to assign. This substitute has not been verified." Sub 2 was used as the verified alternative for all applicable tests. See BUG-02 in the full QA report.
Employee radio settle time:
 The Employee mat-radio-button requires a native mouse click after a waitForSelector plus 800 ms settle delay. Clicking too early after page load silently fails (no search input appears). See BUG-09 in the full QA report.
h2. Acceptance Criteria
Login succeeds with the teacher account (
staffuser210@mailinator.com
)
All 6 absence reasons selectable via the Employee flow
All 4 standard duration types (Full Day, Half Day AM, Half Day PM, Enter Time Manually) work in Employee mode
Add Class flow works for all 6 reasons in Employee mode
All 5 sub preference options available and functional in Employee mode
Sub 2 selectable via Notify 1 Sub and Assign a specific sub
Leave balance deducted correctly after each absence creation
An absence is successfully created in each test case
No blocking errors or UI failures across the 26-test run

sections.title: Result
content: 26/26 tests passed. All 6 reasons, all 5 duration types (including Add Class), and all 5 sub preferences exercised. Sub 2 was successfully selected for all Notify 1 Sub and Assign a specific sub cases.
sections.text: 26/26 tests passed. All 6 reasons, all 5 duration types (including Add Class), and all 5 sub preferences exercised. Sub 2 was successfully selected for all Notify 1 Sub and Assign a specific sub cases.

sections.title: Notes and Observations
content: Angular's autocomplete does not trigger on programmatic fill(). The search field requires real keyboard input (keyboard.type() with per-character delay) to fire change detection and populate the dropdown.

Sub 1 appeared in the picker but cannot be selected — attempting to do so returns "Unable to assign. This substitute has not been verified." Sub 2 was used as the verified alternative for all applicable tests. See BUG-02 in the full QA report.

The Employee mat-radio-button requires a native mouse click after a waitForSelector plus 800 ms settle delay. Clicking too early after page load silently fails (no search input appears). See BUG-09 in the full QA report.
sections.text:
Employee search requires character-by-character typing:
Angular's autocomplete does not trigger on programmatic fill(). The search field requires real keyboard input (keyboard.type() with per-character delay) to fire change detection and populate the dropdown.
Sub 1 unverified:
Sub 1 appeared in the picker but cannot be selected — attempting to do so returns "Unable to assign. This substitute has not been verified." Sub 2 was used as the verified alternative for all applicable tests. See BUG-02 in the full QA report.
Employee radio settle time:
The Employee mat-radio-button requires a native mouse click after a waitForSelector plus 800 ms settle delay. Clicking too early after page load silently fails (no search input appears). See BUG-09 in the full QA report.

No blocking errors or UI failures across the 26-test run

notes.title: Notes and Observations
notes.text:
Employee search requires character-by-character typing:
Angular's autocomplete does not trigger on programmatic fill(). The search field requires real keyboard input (keyboard.type() with per-character delay) to fire change detection and populate the dropdown.
Sub 1 unverified:
Sub 1 appeared in the picker but cannot be selected — attempting to do so returns "Unable to assign. This substitute has not been verified." Sub 2 was used as the verified alternative for all applicable tests. See BUG-02 in the full QA report.
Employee radio settle time:
The Employee mat-radio-button requires a native mouse click after a waitForSelector plus 800 ms settle delay. Clicking too early after page load silently fails (no search input appears). See BUG-09 in the full QA report.
